untranslatable_reason: Elliott Wave pattern detection (5-wave identification and Wave 1 extremes) requires manual pattern recognition or specialized wave-counting logic not available in standard OHLCV indicators. Wave 3 and Wave 5 objectives are calculated values derived from Wave 1 range, which must be pre-computed externally and passed as custom variables (wave_3_objective, wave_5_objective) to the backtest engine. The entry condition 'CONTEXT_DEPENDENT' cannot be expressed with allowed operators and indicators without explicit wave labels.
translation_notes: Signal requires: (1) external Elliott Wave pattern detection to identify the 5-wave structure and establish Wave 1 high/low; (2) pre-calculated wave objectives using the provided Fibonacci formulas: Wave 3 = 0.618 × (Wave1_High − Wave1_Low) + Wave1_High, and Wave 5 = 1.618 × (Wave1_High − Wave1_Low) + Wave1_High. Exit conditions use OR logic: exit when either Wave 3 or Wave 5 objective is reached. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because Elliott Wave patterns can be bullish or bearish. Recommend implementing custom wave detection module upstream of this rule.
